allow: Bash(.env/bin/python -c "import importlib.util as u; print\('papermill spec:', u.find_spec\('papermill'\)\)")
Bash(.env/bin/python -c "import nbformat, nbconvert; print\('nbformat', nbformat.__version__, '| nbconvert', nbconvert.__version__\)")

Bash(env/scripts/runpython -c "import juliacall; from juliacall import Main as jl; jl.seval\('using Statistics'\); print\('juliacall', juliacall.__version__, '| Julia bridge OK, mean=', jl.mean\([1.0,2.0,3.0]\)\)")
